title: English language skills for working holiday visas :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## English language skills for working holiday visas
For some working holiday visas, you will need proof of your English language skills. Check what you will need for the visa you are applying for.
- China Working Holiday Visa — acceptable English language test results Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a China Working Holiday Visa.

## China Working Holiday Visa — acceptable English language test results
Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a China Working Holiday Visa.
- Peru Working Holiday Visa — acceptable English language test results Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a Peru Working Holiday Visa.

## Peru Working Holiday Visa — acceptable English language test results
Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a Peru Working Holiday Visa.
- Philippines, Thailand, Turkey and Vietnam Working Holiday Visas — acceptable English language test results Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a Working Holiday Visa from the Philippines, Thailand, Turkey or Vietnam.

## Philippines, Thailand, Turkey and Vietnam Working Holiday Visas — acceptable English language test results
Find out which English language test results we accept if you are applying for a Working Holiday Visa from the Philippines, Thailand, Turkey or Vietnam.
